title: Meal log core
summary: 실제 섭취를 batch, product, ingredient exact source와 저장 당시 날짜·timezone·nutrition evidence에 결합하는 멱등 backend를 잠근다.
goal: Meal entry와 batch consumed event pointer, exact product/ingredient evidence, complete-partial-unavailable aggregate를 owner-generation RLS와 one-transaction replay authority로 구현한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for any stage
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, implementation, security/DB, five-axis, Stage 3/6 and closeout; no self-approval

dependencies: prepared-food-search-relevance Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1074; runtime remains unified search predecessor
product-ingredient-link-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1076; runtime remains effective ingredient predecessor
recipe-snapshot-authority-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1078; runtime remains nutrition content predecessor
cooked-batch-weight-ledger Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1082; runtime remains batch event and projection predecessor
planner-shell #10 owns Planner navigation and meal-log-ui #12 owns MEAL_LOG UI and design

external_smokes: merged-exact-SHA remote read-only meal-log schema function ACL RLS constraint capability inventory
two-owner three-source nondisclosure and multi-table digest smoke
idempotent create patch delete and different-payload zero-effect smoke
interleaved batch own-event reversal and full replay checksum smoke
timezone DST null-instant and historical no-regroup smoke
exact product ingredient evidence and aggregate-state smoke
account cleanup pointer event entry order smoke

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/meal-log-core.test.ts tests/meal-log-security.test.ts tests/meal-log-batch-events.test.ts tests/meal-log-nutrition-aggregate.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of five core artifacts plus roadmap and status
separate Codex security and DB review of RLS exact-one evidence pointer locks replay cleanup and aggregate authority
separate Codex Stage 3 Stage 6 and closeout reviews

out_of_scope: MEAL_LOG screen sheets recent frequent UX and design authority owned by #12
Weekly nutrition analysis goals medical advice or new bottom tab
Free-text external source or generalized food-items model
Estimated conversion mutable-current repin or client-authored evidence
Second batch remainder event search or aggregate authority
Direct protected DML ordinary hard delete or generic event reversal
New endpoint source type field aggregate state error screen or client authority
Unmerged remote migration production write or capability activation
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned. Approval stays not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security/DB and five-axis reviews reach zero findings. Stage 1 current commands are docs validators/tests/lint/typecheck/audit/diff; implementation evidence is future. Runtime waits for #1, #2, #4 and #8. #9 owns meal-log backend; #10 owns Planner shell, #12 owns MEAL_LOG UI/design, and production activation remains Manual Only.
